title: paeonia corallina subsp. triternata
intro: Paeonia corallina subsp. triternata, also known as the Chinese peony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Paeoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain, improving digestion, and promoting relaxation, due to its high content of glycosides and flavonoids. Paeonia corallina subsp. triternata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used to treat menstrual disorders, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety.
